titleStmt.title: SII 4.1306: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1306. (A.R. No. 391 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavarṣalu 1029 samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritivivallabha
mahārājadirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cō
ḍakula śēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vi
kramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsarivarmmapermmanaḍigalu gaṁggākāvērīpa
ryyaṁta saptamōviṣṇuvarddhanulaina tribhuvanacakravartti śrīkulōttuṁgga
cōḍadēvara pravarddhamānavijayarājyasaṁvatsa 37 śrahi di 390 ṇḍu cōḍa
maṇḍalamu nityavinōdavalanāṁṭi nallūrunāṁṭi rājarājavuramuna nu
nna vyāpāri Araśūruḍayā kōvaṇavankōmanajaligaṇḍaya viṣuvusa
ṁkrāṁtinimittamuna śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti
lōhadaṇḍudiviya 1 ṇḍu . dīniki nācaṁdrārkkamu neyu sariyiṁccuvārugā
śrībhīmēsvaramahādēvara kilaramura prōlabōla naviyayu meṁṭabōla Eṟi
yanayuṁ beddibōla nāvayayuṁ dalarasi navayayu berasina bōlu nalvu(vu)
ruṁ būṁṭagā beddibōla navani vasamuna peṭṭina Eḍlu 50 . nityapaḍi vōya
ṁgala tribhuvanaṁgu(ṁ)śamuna nē māna 1 . likitaṁ peddanācāryyaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 4.1306 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
